findings.summary: 9 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #root > div > header > nav > ul > li:nth-of-type(1) > a (contrast 5.75), #root > div > header > nav > ul > li:nth-of-type(2) > a (contrast 5.75), #root > div > header > nav > ul > li:nth-of-type(3) > a (contrast 5.75), #root > div > div > aside > nav > ul > li:nth-of-type(1) > a (contrast 1.18), #root > div > div > aside > nav > ul > li:nth-of-type(2) > a (contrast 1.18)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.

findings.summary: 2 element(s) use a positive tabindex, forcing a manual tab order: #root > div > button[tabindex=1], #root > div > button[tabindex=1]
findings.persona_impact: Positive tabindex overrides natural order and commonly makes focus jump around unpredictably.
